# Balance Board Controller

Read INSTRUCTIONS.md at the repository root on every pass (commit rules, maintenance).

Read AGENTS.md at the repository root before editing this codebase.

Key files: docs/CODEMAP.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/DEVELOPMENT.md, docs/updates/.

Stack: .NET 8 WPF, Windows x64, vJoy, WiimoteLib. UI in BalanceBoard.App; logic in BalanceBoard.Core.

License: MIT for new code — fork-friendly. Legacy WiiBalanceWalker/ is MS-PL.
